scripts.build: pnpm exec tsc --noEmit --allowImportingTsExtensions --module esnext --moduleResolution bundler --target es2022 --strict --esModuleInterop --forceConsistentCasingInFileNames --skipLibCheck --resolveJsonModule --allowSyntheticDefaultImports src/index.ts src/runtime.ts src/runtime.test.ts src/jobs/buildDigest.ts src/jobs/reviewPendingLeads.ts src/jobs/publishDueReviews.ts src/jobs/ingestEnabledSources.ts src/jobs/ingestEnabledSources.test.ts src/jobs/sendDailyDigests.ts src/jobs/sendDailyDigests.test.ts
scripts.test: pnpm exec vitest run src/jobs/*.test.ts src/runtime.test.ts
